sentences.text: Claude lays out its approach — the pages, how they link, where it'll start — and your folder is still untouched.
Read it carefully: is anything missing, doubled, or out of order?
Say you asked for Order to be its own page, but the plan tucks the order form at the bottom of the Menu page.
You don't restart and you don't approve as-is — you click revise, tell Claude what's off, and it rewrites the plan.
When it looks right, you accept, and Claude builds all the pages at once, linked together with starter copy.
